name: CoreX product logo system
source: design handoff root 'Design project questions answered (3)' — design_handoff_corex_brand_system/Corex Logo System.dc.html and README.md (the locked-winner 'Core X' mark)
author_or_owner: Mustafa Shaaban (CoreX), via the approved CoreX brand & design system handoff
license_or_rights: Owned by the CoreX project. Wordmark glyph outlines are extracted from the self-hosted Space Grotesk variable font (SIL Open Font License 1.1; see theme/assets/fonts/licenses).
approved_by: Repository owner, in-session approval of the design handoff as the authoritative provenance source.

provenance.geometry: Five rounded 12u modules on a 48x48 grid, 3u gutters, 2.5u corner radius; four corner modules use currentColor, the center module uses CoreX brass #c9a25e — verbatim from the approved Core X locked winner.
provenance.wordmark_extraction: Glyph outlines for 'Corex' mechanically extracted (not traced or redrawn) from theme/assets/fonts/space-grotesk-latin-500-700.woff2 instanced at wght=600, letter-spacing -0.035em, with the terminal 'x' in brass.
provenance.excluded: The legacy navy/cyan corex-logo.svg is NOT approved production artwork; it is retained only as rollback/migration evidence. No .dc.html prototype runtime files are shipped.

assets.description: Bare Core X mark, brass core. Decorative icon (favicon/app-icon source).
Wordmark only: 'Core' in currentColor with a brass terminal 'x', Space Grotesk 600 outlines.
Horizontal lockup (mark | divider | wordmark), full-color brass. The default CoreX product logo.
Single-ink lockup, every element currentColor. For print, one-color and forced-colors contexts.
Lockup using the AA-darkened brass #ad8643 core for light / high-contrast backgrounds.
